key.name: min-brightness
key.description: Lower bound of the brightness slider. The screen will never dim below this value.

key.name: min-input
key.description: Lower bound of the "Brightness floor (%)" field in the extension manager.

key.name: max-input
key.description: Upper bound of the "Brightness floor (%)" field in the extension manager.

key.name: brightness
key.description: Current brightness value in percent. Persisted across sessions.

key.name: enabled
key.description: Whether the brightness control is currently active.
